test_cases.name: TC-1: Workflow fires on trigger file push [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: tickets_summerization repo exists; TESTMO_API_TOKEN secret is set | Test Data: trigger file = triggers/RTPL-0000-0000000000000000.json

steps.action: Commit a new file under triggers/ matching pattern RTPL-XXXX-<ts>.json
Wait up to 30 seconds for GitHub Actions to schedule the run
steps.expected: create-testmo-cases workflow appears in the Actions tab with status running

test_cases.name: TC-2: Testmo folder created under AI-Generated-Test-Cases [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: parent folder ID 382 exists in Testmo project 3 | Test Data: expected folder name = 'RTPL-0000 — Automation Smoke Test'

steps.action: Look for a subfolder named 'RTPL-0000 — Automation Smoke Test'
steps.expected: Subfolder is present and contains 3 test cases (TC-1 through TC-3)

test_cases.name: TC-3: Trigger file is removed and completion file is written [Priority: Medium]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: workflow run completed with status success | Test Data: completion file path = completed/RTPL-0000-0000000000000000.json

steps.action: Pull the latest main branch locally
Verify completed/RTPL-0000-0000000000000000.json exists and contains status=success with folder_id and case_ids
steps.expected: Trigger file removed; completion file present with success payload
